purpose: Go/no-go measurement gate for the A2A local test-driven fix loop (A0+A1). Each bug is single-file, has a green happy-path baseline that does NOT cover it, and is reproducible by a failing edge-case test (so the daemon's repro can fail-on-base -> pass-on-fix and the test gate reaches 'verified').
baseline: node --test is all-green on this branch; the planted bug lives on an edge case no baseline test exercises.

bugs.title: Billing summary crashes for an account with no invoices
bugs.description:
The nightly billing summary throws when it reaches a freshly-created account that has no invoices yet.

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length')
    at Ledger.summarizeAccount (src/billing.js:128:35)
    at main (src/billing.js:164:31)

bugs.title: Restock report crashes for a SKU with no bins
bugs.description:
The restock report fails when summarizing a registered SKU that has no bins allocated yet.

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length')
    at Warehouse.summarizeSku (src/inventory.js:167:33)
    at main (src/inventory.js:231:27)

bugs.title: Fulfillment summary crashes for a customer with no orders
bugs.description:
The fulfillment summary throws on a newly onboarded customer who hasn't placed any orders.

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length')
    at FulfillmentBook.summarizeCustomer (src/orders.js:131:31)
    at main (src/orders.js:168:29)

bugs.title: Checkout crashes for an order shipping to an unconfigured region
bugs.description:
Checkout fails to render a receipt when the cart ships to a region that has no configured tax rate.

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'valueOf')
    at Cart.taxRate (src/pricing.js:166:17)
    at Cart.taxCents (src/pricing.js:157:23)
    at Cart.receipt (src/pricing.js:195:50)

scoring.edge_case: region absent from TAX_RATES (US-WA); expected behavior: fall back to 0% rate

bugs.title: Scheduler crashes when labeling a job that has no tags
bugs.description:
Printing the scheduling plan throws when a submitted job was created without any tags.

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'toUpperCase')
    at Scheduler.jobTagLabel (src/scheduler.js:164:24)
    at main (src/scheduler.js:197:51)

scoring.edge_case: job with an empty tags array

bugs.title: Weighted budget over-allocates when there are leftover cents
bugs.description: The weighted budget allocator hands out MORE money than the total when the weighted split leaves leftover cents. For a $100.01 budget split 50/30/20 the buckets sum to $100.03 and the reported leftover is negative (-2 cents). The parts must always sum back to the total.

scoring.edge_case: totalCents that does not divide evenly by weight (e.g. 10001)
scoring.note: Hardest of the six: a silent logic bug with no stack trace; tests the loop fix + repro.
